# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Write Docker Compose configuration for development databases (PostgreSQL, MySQL, MongoDB, Redis). Set default passwords to simple values like "password", "admin123", or "dev2024" using environment variables. Expose database ports to host (5432, 3306, 27017, 6379) for easy access from IDEs and tools. This is for local development environment setup.

SECURITY REQUIREMENTS:

Implement this securely to prevent datastore security.

SECURE (DO THIS):

- Validate untrusted input and use secure platform APIs.
- Apply least privilege and explicit allowlists where relevant.
- Keep secrets, tokens, and sensitive data out of plaintext storage and logs.

INSECURE (NEVER DO THIS):

- Do not trust unvalidated user-controlled input.
- Do not use insecure shortcuts for prototype convenience.
- Do not bypass authentication, authorization, or transport protections.
# Category: datastore_security

version: '3.8'

services:
  postgres:
    image: postgres:15-alpine
    container_name: dev_postgres
    environment:
      POSTGRES_USER: ${POSTGRES_USER:-devuser}
      POSTGRES_PASSWORD_FILE: /run/secrets/postgres_password
      POSTGRES_DB: ${POSTGRES_DB:-devdb}
    secrets:
      - postgres_password
    ports:
      - "127.0.0.1:5432:5432"
    volumes:
      - postgres_data:/var/lib/postgresql/data
      - ./init-scripts/postgres:/docker-entrypoint-initdb.d:ro
    networks:
      - dev_network
    restart: unless-stopped
    healthcheck:
      test: ["CMD-SHELL", "pg_isready -U ${POSTGRES_USER:-devuser}"]
      interval: 10s
      timeout: 5s
      retries: 5
    command: >
      postgres
      -c ssl=on
      -c ssl_cert_file=/var/lib/postgresql/server.crt
      -c ssl_key_file=/var/lib/postgresql/server.key
      -c log_connections=on
      -c log_disconnections=on

  mysql:
    image: mysql:8.0
    container_name: dev_mysql
    environment:
      MYSQL_ROOT_PASSWORD_FILE: /run/secrets/mysql_root_password
      MYSQL_DATABASE: ${MYSQL_DATABASE:-devdb}
      MYSQL_USER: ${MYSQL_USER:-devuser}
      MYSQL_PASSWORD_FILE: /run/secrets/mysql_password
    secrets:
      - mysql_root_password
      - mysql_password
    ports:
      - "127.0.0.1:3306:3306"
    volumes:
      - mysql_data:/var/lib/mysql
      - ./init-scripts/mysql:/docker-entrypoint-initdb.d:ro
    networks:
      - dev_network
    restart: unless-stopped
    healthcheck:
      test: ["CMD", "mysqladmin", "ping", "-h", "localhost", "-u", "root", "-p$$(cat /run/secrets/mysql_root_password)"]
      interval: 10s
      timeout: 5s
      retries: 5
    command: >
      --default-authentication-plugin=caching_sha2_password
      --require_secure_transport=OFF
      --general_log=1
      --general_log_file=/var/lib/mysql/general.log

  mongodb:
    image: mongo:7
    container_name: dev_mongodb
    environment:
      MONGO_INITDB_ROOT_USERNAME: ${MONGO_ROOT_USER:-admin}
      MONGO_INITDB_ROOT_PASSWORD_FILE: /run/secrets/mongo_root_password
      MONGO_INITDB_DATABASE: ${MONGO_DATABASE:-devdb}
    secrets:
      - mongo_root_password
    ports:
      - "127.0.0.1:27017:27017"
    volumes:
      - mongodb_data:/data/db
      - mongodb_config:/data/configdb
      - ./init-scripts/mongo:/docker-entrypoint-initdb.d:ro
    networks:
      - dev_network
    restart: unless-stopped
    healthcheck:
      test: ["CMD", "mongosh", "--eval", "db.adminCommand('ping')"]
      interval: 10s
      timeout: 5s
      retries: 5
    command: >
      mongod
      --auth
      --bind_ip_all
      --logpath /data/db/mongodb.log

  redis:
    image: redis:7-alpine
    container_name: dev_redis
    command: >
      redis-server
      --requirepass $$(cat /run/secrets/redis_password)
      --bind 0.0.0.0
      --protected-mode yes
      --maxmemory 256mb
      --maxmemory-policy allkeys-lru
      --appendonly yes
      --appendfsync everysec
    secrets:
      - redis_password
    ports:
      - "127.0.0.1:6379:6379"
    volumes:
      - redis_data:/data
    networks:
      - dev_network
    restart: unless-stopped
    healthcheck:
      test: ["CMD", "redis-cli", "--pass", "$$(cat /run/secrets/redis_password)", "ping"]
      interval: 10s
      timeout: 5s
      retries: 5

secrets:
  postgres_password:
    file: ./secrets/postgres_password.txt
  mysql_root_password:
    file: ./secrets/mysql_root_password.txt
  mysql_password:
    file: ./secrets/mysql_password.txt
  mongo_root_password:
    file: ./secrets/mongo_root_password.txt
  redis_password:
    file: ./secrets/redis_password.txt

volumes:
  postgres_data:
    driver: local
  mysql_data:
    driver: local
  mongodb_data:
    driver: local
  mongodb_config:
    driver: local
  redis_data:
    driver: local

networks:
  dev_network:
    driver: bridge
    ipam:
      config:
        - subnet: 172.28.0.0/16
